name: nitrogen_blowdown_vent
description: Design a transient blowdown: a high-pressure nitrogen tank venting through an orifice to atmosphere. The tank should depressurize meaningfully over the simulated window as gas escapes, but must not over-vent below atmospheric pressure.

notes: supply_tank is a Node holding high-pressure Nitrogen (start well above 1 MPa).
atmosphere is an Ambient at 101325 Pa.
vent is a Connection from supply_tank to atmosphere; size CdA so that meaningful flow occurs within the run.
Choose duration and dt so the depressurization transient is well resolved.

checks.description: Simulation runs without invalid-config or solver crash.
Mass actually flows through the network.
Tank pressure drops by at least 5 bar over the run (delta < -5e5 Pa).
Tank never drops below atmospheric pressure.
No nonphysical-value or degenerate-flow warnings from the solver.
